subject: A blue-skinned faerie in mid-flight, clutching a bundle of loose pages torn from a book, with translucent dragonfly-like wings spread behind her
description: A slender faerie with luminous pale-blue skin and dark hair swoops downward through a moonlit night sky, her translucent crystalline wings fanned out behind her in a sweep of jagged pale-blue panels. She clutches a sheaf of loose papers — pages just stolen from a book — to her chest with both arms, glancing back over her shoulder with a sly, mischievous expression. The palette is dominated by deep midnight blues, electric cobalt highlights along her wings, and the off-white of the parchment pages catching what little light there is. The whole image reads as a thief caught in the act, frozen mid-getaway against a stylized indigo void.
foreground: faerie clutching stolen pages, wings spread mid-flight
background: moonlit indigo night sky with painterly cloud suggestions
emotion: mischievous, sly, caught-in-the-act glance over the shoulder
